development.name: Development
development.description: Each time Lloyd takes damage, gain 1 Build stack. Each stack grants +1 attack and +1 defense. At 10 stacks, lose all stacks and gain Ultimate.
development.mobileDescription: Taking damage gives stacks that increase attack/defense. At 10 stacks, you gain your ultimate.

gluttony.name: Gluttony
gluttony.description: Each time Rimuru deals damage, gain 1 Experience stack. Experience stacks permanently grant +1 attack, +1 defense, and +1 max health. When reaching 10 Experience stacks, convert 10 Experience into 1 Raphael stack and gain Ultimate. Raphael stacks grant the same bonuses as 10 Experience stacks and cannot be removed.
gluttony.mobileDescription: Dealing damage grants stacks that increase stats and taking damage removes them. Ten stacks become permanent and grant his ultimate.

room_surgeon.name: Room Surgeon
room_surgeon.description: When Law deals damage, recover 5% of max health. Ultimate becomes available after recovering 80 total health. Using Ultimate resets recovery count to 0.
room_surgeon.mobileDescription: Dealing damage heals you. Heal enough total to unlock your ultimate.

push_the_limits.name: Push The Limits
push_the_limits.description: Each time Saitama takes damage, gain 1 Annoyed stack. Each stack grants +1 attack. At 7 stacks, Ultimate becomes available. Annoyed stacks are lost when transforming.
push_the_limits.mobileDescription: Taking damage builds stacks that increase attack. At 7 stacks, you gain your ultimate.

serious_growth.name: Serious Growth
serious_growth.description: At the start of each of your turns, permanently gain +15 attack. Ultimate becomes available after attacking 2 times.
serious_growth.mobileDescription: Gain permanent attack every turn. After 2 attacks, your ultimate becomes available.

automail_overclock.name: Overclocked Automail
automail_overclock.description: Generate Heat with Automail attacks and vent it with coolant. Heat makes you stronger but unstable: every 5 Heat grants +1 true damage on your attacks, and every 10 Heat makes you take +1 true damage when you take damage. At 50 Heat, Ultimate becomes available. Upon taking lethal damage, revive once at 50% health in a weakened form.
automail_overclock.mobileDescription: Build Heat to deal more damage, but Heat also makes you take more damage. At 50 Heat, you unlock your ultimate. You can revive once.

blossoming_emotion.name: Blossoming Emotion
blossoming_emotion.description: At the start of each of your turns, your opponent recovers 10 health. Ultimate becomes available after your opponent recovers 50 health.
blossoming_emotion.mobileDescription: Each turn you heal your opponent. After healing them enough, you unlock your ultimate.

chen_melee_cooldown_master.name: Cooldown Mastery
chen_melee_cooldown_master.description: Gain Ultimate at the start of battle. Each time you use a skill, reduce the cooldown of one of your other skills by 1 (or empower a skill that benefits from cooldown reduction).
chen_melee_cooldown_master.mobileDescription: Start the battle with your ultimate. Using a skill reduces the cooldown of another skill.

frost_resonance.name: Frost Resonance
frost_resonance.description: Each time the opponent deals skill damage, they gain 1 Permafrost. At the start of your turn, if the opponent has at least 10 Permafrost, remove 10 and freeze them for 2 turns. Each time an opponent is frozen, gain 1 Frozen Queen stack. Once per game, when Emilia dies, rewind time to her last turn alive and redo it.
frost_resonance.mobileDescription: Enemy skill damage builds Permafrost on them. At 10 stacks you freeze them. Once per game, you revive by rewinding your last turn.

limited_immortality.name: Limited Immortality
limited_immortality.description: Yato starts with 9 stacks of Immortality. Each time he would take fatal damage, remove one stack instead. Once the last stack is removed, Yato recovers 8% of max health. Every third stack of Immortality Yato loses, Yato will gain his Ultimate.
limited_immortality.mobileDescription: You have multiple extra lives (stacks). Losing stacks can grant your ultimate. When the last stack is gone, you heal.

kiss_of_death_passive.name: Partner Killer
kiss_of_death_passive.description: Gain Heartbreak based on your opponent's actions. Heartbreak is capped at 100. Each Heartbreak grants +1 max health and +1 current health. At 66 Heartbreak, Ultimate becomes available.
kiss_of_death_passive.mobileDescription: Gain Heartbreak from your opponent's actions. At 66 Heartbreak, you unlock your ultimate.

naruto_natural_energy.name: Natural Energy Balance
naruto_natural_energy.description: Balance ranges from -3 to +3. Yang skills shifts Balance by +1, Yin skills shifts Balance by -1. Ultimate unlocks when you reach either extremity.
naruto_natural_energy.mobileDescription: Using skills shifts your Balance between -3 and +3. Reaching either end unlocks your ultimate.

naruto_sage_mode.name: Six Paths Sage Mode
naruto_sage_mode.description: Alternate skills to gain Orbs and reaching the maximum of 5 grants ultimate. At the start of each of your turns, recover 2 health per Sage Orb. Sage Orbs also grant +1 permanent attack per orb gained.
naruto_sage_mode.mobileDescription: Alternate skills to gain Orbs and reaching the maximum of 5 grants ultimate. Orbs permanently increase attack and heal you each turn.

spell_archive.name: Spell Archive
spell_archive.description: Whenever your opponent uses a skill, record its type as a Page (max 5). Pages empower your spells. At maximum Pages, Ultimate becomes available.
spell_archive.mobileDescription: Enemy skills create Pages (max 5). Pages empower you, and at max Pages you unlock your ultimate.

naofumi_shield_rotation.name: Shield Rotation
naofumi_shield_rotation.description: At the start of each of your turns, switch to a new shield (each shield appears once). Your passive is replaced by the current shield. At the 7th shield, rotation stops.
naofumi_shield_rotation.mobileDescription: Each turn you switch to a new shield, which replaces your passive for that turn.

kaito_nen_restrictions.name: Nen Restrictions
kaito_nen_restrictions.description: Kaito's damaging skills are enhanced per restriction. He starts with one restriction. Kaito loses his weapon after using 2 skills.
kaito_nen_restrictions.mobileDescription: Restrictions boost Kaito's damage. After using 2 skills, he loses his weapon.
